title: [ExportVerilog] Emit modules in descending order of module size
body:
This commit implements a variant of `parallelForLoop` which invokes the
function in the descending order of the specified parameter. By using
this function, it is possible to emit large modules first. Size of each module 
is pre-calculated in `gatherFiles`.

Will close https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/2330
